commit.subject: LU-14920 llite: Don't remove SBI flag for pdio
commit.message:
LU-14920 llite: Don't remove SBI flag for pdio

Try disabling pdio while still setting the SBI flag.

I'm guessing this might *fail*.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9ff676e33b806fc71c315a57190ffd8cc830d3a2
